samples.xml_description:
<module id="accu">
    <description>Accumulate input data in 4 cycles and output the result.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data for addition.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating readiness for new data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating when 4 input data accumulation is reached.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[9:0]">10-bit output data representing the accumulated sum.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="IDLE">0</parameter>
        <parameter name="ADD">1</parameter>
        <parameter name="OUTPUT">2</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="state" width_description="[1:0]">State register.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="count">Counter register.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="sum" width_description="[9:0]">Accumulated sum register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <case>
            <case_item id="state">
                <case_expression>
                    <const id="IDLE" />
                </case_expression>
                <case_items>
                    <case_item>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <condition id="valid_in" />
                            </and>
                        </condition>
                        <action>
                            <assign id="state" value="ADD" />
                        </action>
                    </case_item>
                    <case_item>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <condition id="count" operator="==" value="4" />
                                <condition id="valid_in" operator="!" />
                            </and>
                        </condition>
                        <action>
                            <assign id="state" value="OUTPUT" />
                        </action>
                    </case_item>
                    <case_item>
                        <condition>
                            <and>
                                <condition id="state" operator="==" value="OUTPUT" />
                                <condition id="valid_out" operator="!" />
                            </and>
                        </condition>
                        <action>
                            <assign id="state" value="IDLE" />
                        </action>
                    </case_item>
                </case_items>
            </case_item>
        </case>
        <case>
            <case_item id="count">
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <condition id="state" operator="==" value="ADD" />
                        <condition id="count" operator="==" value="4" />
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <assign id="count" value="0" />
                </action>
            </case_item>
            <case_item>
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <condition id="state" operator="==" value="ADD" />
                        <condition id="valid_in" />
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <assign id="count" value="count + 1" />
                </action>
            </case_item>
        </case>
        <case>
            <case_item id="sum">
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <condition id="state" operator="==" value="ADD" />
                        <condition id="valid_in" />
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <assign id="sum" value="sum + data_in" />
                </action>
            </case_item>
        </case>
        <assign id="data_out" value="sum" />
        <assign id="valid_out" value="state == OUTPUT" />
    </implementation>
</module>

                            : ... In instance accu
   46 |         else if (valid_in) sum <= sum + data_in;
      |                                       ^
                ... Use "/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.

                            : ... In instance accu
   49 |     else if (state == 2'd0 && valid_in) sum <= data_in;
      |                                             ^~
